beliefs.belief: The companion app is unreliable and causes significant frustration.
Physical mobility is limited and challenging due to recurring knee issues.
beliefs.evidence: my knees have been acting up. Makes it hard to get around!

beliefs.belief: The user holds hope that upcoming appointments will lead to functional improvements in multiple areas of life.
beliefs.evidence: Hope this app works better by then!

downstream_scores.suggested_follow_up: Dealing with both tech glitches and physical pain sounds exhausting; is there one area right now where I can help you feel less frustrated?
